keyFindings.finding: K props missed at an alarming rate
keyFindings.detail: 7 of 11 pitcher K props lost. Wheeler (6 vs 6.5), Eovaldi (6 vs 6.5), Kirby (3 vs 5.5), Ginn (2 vs 5.5), Sasaki (4 vs 5.5), Meyer alt (8 vs 8.5). Only Bradley (7), Meyer (8), Urena (6), Holmes (7), Gallen (6) cashed.
keyFindings.actionable: Tighten K line selection; avoid SP lines within 0.5 of realistic ceiling unless supported by opponent wRC+ data

keyFindings.finding: F5 unders suffered from early-inning barrages
keyFindings.detail: 7 F5 bets lost. SF scored 9 in first five vs CWS, KC blitzed SEA with 4 F5 runs. F5 under logic broke down when opposing lineups went early on struggling starters.
keyFindings.actionable: F5 under requires both starters to be in strong form; do not assume F5 under when the opposing starter has ERA above 4.50

keyFindings.finding: A-tier Lock Wheeler K missed by a single out
keyFindings.detail: Wheeler struck out 6 vs the 6.5 line in a 3-0 shutout win. Edge was real but the thin margin on the K line cost us. ML and under both hit.
keyFindings.actionable: A-tier K props should require at least 1.5 K cushion above line; within-1 K props are too narrow for Lock designation

keyFindings.finding: Two upsets burned heavy favorites today
keyFindings.detail: WSH over ATL (-162) and SEA over KC (-138) both lost outright. Both had heavy line exposure on ML and F5 ML.
keyFindings.actionable: Cap ML stake on dog-barrier favorites above -150 to limit upset bleed; favor run-line or F5 exposure instead

keyFindings.finding: NRFI failed on games with weak openers
keyFindings.detail: 5 NRFI losses — LAD@MIL (MIL 3 in 1st off Sasaki), TEX@LAA (LAA 2 in 1st), SEA@KC (KC 3 in 1st), MIN@BOS (MIN 2 in 1st). All involved a SP with sub-par first-inning metrics.
keyFindings.actionable: NRFI requires first-inning K rate above 25% for both starters; do not default to NRFI without checking 1st-inning splits

brightSpots: CIN@STL G2 sweep: 6 of 7 picks won including over 9, Reds ML, F5 over, team totals, and any HR
ATH@SD sweep: 6 of 7 won in a dominant Padres pitching performance with 2-0 final
MIN@BOS: 5 of 7 won including underdog Twins ML at +110 and Bradley K 7 clearing 6.5
Meyer K Over 6.5 (A-tier Lock) delivered 8 Ks in MIA win; Peralta cashed too at 9 Ks
Holmes K 7 (WSH@ATL) and Gallen K 6 (COL@ARI) and Urena K 6 (TEX@LAA) all covered despite team losses
